---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, flag, template, or skill pack
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem:** what can't you do today, or what's awkward right now?

**Proposed solution:**

**Alternatives considered:**

**Scope check:** this project stays intentionally lightweight — zero
runtime dependencies, no plugin system, no enforcement beyond the git
hooks and CI workflow it already scaffolds. Please skim
[ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) first. If this falls under "Explicitly out
of scope" there, explain what makes your case different rather than
re-proposing it as-is.

**Willing to submit a PR yourself?**
